metadata.name: host.log
metadata.description: console.log proxy exposed to wasm-backed kinds. WAT modules import via (import "host" "log" ...); Python lambdas call host.log(...). Sync. Apps that want quiet runs can replace _fn with a noop after install.

metadata.name: host.warn
metadata.description: console.warn proxy. Same pattern as host.log.

metadata.name: host.error
metadata.description: console.error proxy. Same pattern as host.log.

metadata.name: host.now
metadata.description: Date.now proxy — milliseconds since the Unix epoch. Sync. Use this rather than calling Date.now inside a lambda directly: replacing _fn with a deterministic clock (e.g., a fixed counter) lets tests run replay-deterministically without monkey-patching globals.

metadata.name: host.random
metadata.description: Math.random proxy — pseudorandom number in [0, 1). Sync. Same testability story as host.now: swap _fn with a seeded PRNG for deterministic tests.
